    { "criterion": "AC7: renewSubscription throws CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED for cancelled subscriptions", "status": "implemented", "test": "renewSubscription > AC7: throws CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED for a cancelled subscription", "notes": "" },
    { "criterion": "AC8: listSubscriptions returns all subscriptions (active and cancelled) for a user", "status": "implemented", "test": "listSubscriptions > AC8: returns all subscriptions (active and cancelled) for a user", "notes": "Also covers empty-list, cross-user isolation, and post-cancel status reflection" }
  ],

  "tests": [
